commit_message: docs: add v2.0G chat-to-PR live pilot proof
pr_body:
## Summary

This PR is the V2.0G chat-to-PR live pilot. It is intentionally docs-only and keeps production deploy separate from source-control writeback.

## Safety

- scoped GitHub token required
- docs-only file prefix
- generated branch
- human review before merge
- rollback is close PR and delete generated branch

## Evidence

Generated by the Veloce V2.0 production execution control plane.
proof_markdown:
# V2.0G Chat-to-PR Live Pilot

This docs-only file is the live pilot target for approved chat-to-PR work.

The control boundary is: approved chat plan -> generated GitHub branch -> docs-only file update -> pull request -> audit ledger -> graph memory.
